fact: The UESC Marathon is a hollowed-out Martian moon named Deimos.
common_error: The Marathon was a ship built in a shipyard on Earth.
omo_correction: INACCURATE. The Marathon is a converted celestial body (Deimos), not a manufactured vessel.

fact: Soulkiller is a lethal program that digitizes consciousness but kills the physical body.
common_error: Soulkiller can be used as a medical tool to save dying people.
omo_correction: CRITICAL MISINTERPRETATION. Soulkiller is an execution tool; its use results in the death of the biological host.
